segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a dimly lit gothic chamber with vaulted stone ceilings. An ornate iron cage containing glowing red embers stands on the left, while a four-poster bed with dark green drapery occupies the right side. The room is illuminated by warm artificial light from a wall sconce, creating an atmospheric, mysterious ambiance with no movement or changes throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze within a dimly lit gothic chamber that remains frozen in a state of mysterious stillness. It begins with a wide view of the vaulted stone ceilings and the heavy architecture of the room. The camera lingers on the contrast between the ornate iron cage glowing with red embers on the left and the dark green drapery of a four-poster bed on the right. This composition is held steady as warm artificial light from a wall sconce casts deep shadows across the stone surfaces. The scene concludes without shift or motion, preserving the oppressive and silent ambiance of the interior.
